error.invalid_catalog: Casa returned an invalid voice-agent catalog. Check Casa's enabled ha_voice agent names and configuration.

abort.invalid_discovery: Casa supplied an invalid Supervisor discovery record.

data_description.satellite_entity_overrides: Usually leave this empty. Configure it only when one Home Assistant device has multiple assist_satellite entities and Casa cannot determine where to speak a queued result. For example, map device ID abc123 to assist_satellite.kitchen_voice; results originating from abc123 will then play on that kitchen satellite. Without an override, Casa safely declines an ambiguous announcement rather than speaking on the wrong device.

error.invalid_satellite_entity_overrides: Enter a JSON object whose assist_satellite entities are currently bound to the matching device IDs.

initiate_flow.user: Voice agents are discovered from Casa automatically

data_description.session_mode: How memory scope is derived: per device, per user, or per conversation.
data_description.transport: Prefer WebSocket for voice session registration and background results, or use SSE as a stateless fallback.
data_description.idle_stability_ms: How long Casa waits after the voice assistant becomes idle before speaking a queued specialist result. This prevents Gary from interrupting an active conversation or follow-up. If the device is already idle, the result is spoken immediately. Default: 750 ms.

error.invalid_idle_stability: Enter a whole number from 0 to 5000.

abort.catalog_managed: Voice agents are discovered from Casa and cannot be added manually.
